mapper.select:
SELECT cr.room_id as roomId,
CONCAT(c.nickname, ' & ', b.company_name) as partnerName,
b.company_name as partnerName,
c.nickname as partnerName,
IFNULL( CASE WHEN m.message_type = 'IMAGE' THEN '(사진)' ELSE m.content END, '대화 내용이 없습니다.' ) as lastMessage, CASE WHEN m.send_at IS NULL THEN '' WHEN DATE(m.send_at) = CURDATE() THEN DATE_FORMAT(m.send_at, '%H:%i') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(m.send_at, '%m-%d') END as lastMessageTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message cm WHERE cm.room_id = cr.room_id AND cm.is_read = 0) as unreadCount FROM chat_room cr JOIN business b ON cr.business_id = b.business_id JOIN customer c ON cr.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t1.room_id, t1.message_type, t1.content, t1.send_at FROM chat_message t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT room_id, MAX(message_id) as max_id FROM chat_message GROUP BY room_id ) t2 ON t1.message_id = t2.max_id ) m ON cr.room_id = m.room_id
1=1
AND cr.customer_id = #{myId}
AND cr.business_id = #{myId}
ORDER BY IFNULL(m.send_at, cr.created_at) DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message cm JOIN chat_room cr ON cm.room_id = cr.room_id WHERE cm.is_read = 0
AND 1=0
AND cr.customer_id = #{myId} AND cm.sender_type != 'CUSTOMER'
AND cr.business_id = #{myId} AND cm.sender_type != 'BUSINESS'
